---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the adaptive firmware layer
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

A clear description of the problem. What's the workflow that's painful today?

## What do you want to happen?

A clear description of the desired behavior.

## How would you use it?

A short user-story or example:

> As a [hardware engineer / AI infra person / researcher], I want to
> [do X] so that [Y happens].

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you tried or considered? What didn't work?

## Additional context

Screenshots, code sketches, links to papers, anything that helps.
